concerns.text: Hyperbolic volume validation against KnotInfo (FR-013, SC-014) requires explicit source independence documentation. If Knot Atlas and KnotInfo share underlying data sources (e.g., Hoste-Thistlethwaite-Weeks enumeration), this validation is a consistency cross-check, NOT independent verification. The plan requires documenting source independence but should explicitly state that shared sources invalidate claims of independent validation.
